hypothesis: The best model so far uses num_leaves=256 (WRMSSE=0.94669). Hypothesis: reducing learning_rate from 0.05 to 0.03 with num_leaves=256 will allow the model to find a better optimum with more careful gradient steps. To compensate for the lower learning rate within the time budget, keep n_estimators=800 but rely on early stopping (rounds=50) to find the best iteration. All other settings unchanged from exp_0029.
